name: KENJUTSU: KESSEN OUGI - HIRYUUSAI (SWORD ART: ABSOLUTE FIGHTING SKILL - FLYING DRAGON SLASH)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 9 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 10

Learn DC: 24 | Successes: 4

Perform: 12 | Perform DC: 26

Components: F, Mas Mob

Make one attack per 5 levels (maximum 4), each at your highest attack bonus. Each attack deals half your normal weapon damage on hit, as well as 2 temporary Strength damage, but they cannot score critical hits, nor can you apply sneak attack damage to them. The Strength damage is cumulative from multiple hits, but not from multiple uses of this technique against the same target.

A Samurai with at least 10 class levels may substitute this technique for a normal attack when they make a Full Attack (using the same attack bonus as the substituted attack), but only if they chose the Kenjutsu path, and only once per round. If you substitute the technique this way, the Perform Requirements are automatically met.

This technique can be used once per day.

Mastery: On hit, you may choose to deal no immediate damage. Instead, the damage is dealt up to a number of rounds later (based on mastery level). If the damage would reduce the target to -1 hp when you hit and choose to delay, the target is paralyzed until it takes damage from any source. Step 1: One round, Step 3: Two rounds, Step 5: Three rounds. The second and fourth steps allow you to use this technique an additional time per day.
